name: @drexthealpha/sss-token
description: Solana Stablecoin Standard SDK — SSS-1 and SSS-2 presets

scripts.test: ts-node -e "const { SolanaStablecoin } = require('./src/index'); const { PublicKey } = require('@solana/web3.js'); const mint = new PublicKey('11111111111111111111111111111111'); const pda1 = SolanaStablecoin.getConfigPDA(mint); const pda2 = SolanaStablecoin.getConfigPDA(mint); if (pda1.toBase58() !== pda2.toBase58()) throw new Error('PDA mismatch'); console.log('PDA derivation: PASS'); console.log('Config PDA:', pda1.toBase58());"
